name: get_rank_tracker
description: Read-only access to rank tracker configs and their latest results. With `trackerId`, returns config + latest snapshot per keyword. Without it, lists all trackers in the project. Free — reads from OpenSEO state, no DataForSEO call. To trigger a new check, use the dashboard.

projectId.description: Required. The OpenSEO project ID to scope this call to. Get one from list_projects.

trackerId.description: Rank tracker config ID. If omitted, lists all rank trackers in the project.
